hero.title: Journey to the Living Eden
hero.subtitle: Small-group voyages through the Galapagos Islands, guided by naturalists and built around the wild rhythm of the archipelago.

home.featuredSubtitle: Hand-crafted itineraries for every kind of traveler.
home.whySubtitle: A calmer, deeper way to see the enchanted islands.

guides.title: Expert Naturalist Guides
guides.body: Licensed, bilingual guides who know every finch, tortoise, and current.

smallGroups.title: Small Groups
smallGroups.body: Intimate vessels and land stays keep the experience personal and low-impact.

conservation.title: Conservation First
conservation.body: We follow strict sustainability practices and support local communities.

flexibility.title: Flexible Itineraries
flexibility.body: Tailor your days to wildlife, photography, or pure rest.

home.contactSubtitle: Reach us on WhatsApp or WeChat, or browse packages to begin.

footer.text: Galapagos Voyages - responsible travel to the enchanted islands.
